channel.title: NPR Topics: Environment
channel.description: Breaking news on the environment, climate change, pollution, and endangered species. Also featuring Climate Connections, a special series on climate change co-produced by NPR and National Geographic.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: An Israeli paraglider tries to save migrating swifts that nest in the Western Wall
item.description: Swifts have nested in Jerusalem's Western Wall since biblical times. Now one Israeli paraglider is trying to save them.
item.content:encoded:
Swifts have nested in Jerusalem's Western Wall since biblical times. Now one Israeli paraglider is trying to save them.

(Image credit: Ruth Sherlock)
item.dc:creator: Ruth Sherlock

item.title: What we can learn from the unique smell of wildfire smoke
item.description: NPR's Adrian Ma speaks with Derek Mallia, professor University of Utah's Department of Atmospheric Sciences, about why wildfire smoke in the northeast has a distinctive smell.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Adrian Ma speaks with Derek Mallia, professor University of Utah's Department of Atmospheric Sciences, about why wildfire smoke in the northeast has a distinctive smell.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Ma

item.title: Dangerous wildfire smoke continues to blanket parts of the U.S.
item.description: Orange skies and heavy smoke covered large parts of the U.S. on Thursday as Canada and Minnesota grapple with wildfires. Hazardous air quality is expected to continue.
item.content:encoded:
Orange skies and heavy smoke covered large parts of the U.S. on Thursday as Canada and Minnesota grapple with wildfires. Hazardous air quality is expected to continue.

(Image credit: Spencer Platt)
item.dc:creator: Ava Berger

item.title: Fear and hope in Utah in the shadow of America's largest wildfire
item.description: People in Monticello, Utah have been tense and preparing to evacuate since shortly after the Babylon fire started June 26th
item.content:encoded:
People in Monticello, Utah have been tense and preparing to evacuate since shortly after the Babylon fire started June 26th

(Image credit: Inciweb)
item.dc:creator: Adam Burke

item.title: Trump again shrinks Utah national monuments
item.description: President Trump reduced by 90% the size of two national monuments in Utah that were established by Presidents Clinton and Obama.
item.content:encoded: President Trump reduced by 90% the size of two national monuments in Utah that were established by Presidents Clinton and Obama.
item.dc:creator: David Condos

item.title: Environmental groups sue government to stop a big change to the Endangered Species Act
item.description: By altering the definition of the word "harm" as used by the Endangered Species Act, the Trump administration may limit how wildlife is protected in the United States. Environmental groups are suing.
item.content:encoded:
By altering the definition of the word "harm" as used by the Endangered Species Act, the Trump administration may limit how wildlife is protected in the United States. Environmental groups are suing.

(Image credit: Jared Lloyd)
item.dc:creator: Ari Daniel

item.title: EV battery recycling has a math problem
item.description: For some electric vehicle batteries, it costs more to recycle them than they're worth. That creates all kinds of problems, which a new Colorado law aims to solve.
item.content:encoded: For some electric vehicle batteries, it costs more to recycle them than they're worth. That creates all kinds of problems, which a new Colorado law aims to solve.
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: Trump administration rolls back a key protection for imperiled wildlife
item.description: The Trump administration finalized a rule Friday that changes how agencies enforce the Endangered Species Act. The administration narrowed the definition of "harm" under the landmark law.
item.content:encoded:
The Trump administration finalized a rule Friday that changes how agencies enforce the Endangered Species Act. The administration narrowed the definition of "harm" under the landmark law.

(Image credit: Carolyn Kaster)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: EPA proposes weakening heavy-duty truck pollution rules
item.description: The Trump EPA calls Biden-era rules for cutting pollution from heavy trucks "unworkable." The proposed changes have been celebrated by trucking groups and denounced by environmental groups.
item.content:encoded:
The Trump EPA calls Biden-era rules for cutting pollution from heavy trucks "unworkable." The proposed changes have been celebrated by trucking groups and denounced by environmental groups.

(Image credit: Brandon Bell)
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: A new kind of robot swims the seas and soars the skies
item.description: Inspired by diving birds, roboticists built the lightweight machines to move from water to air. The design may one day lead to robots that can monitor and sample the coastal ocean.
item.content:encoded:
Inspired by diving birds, roboticists built the lightweight machines to move from water to air. The design may one day lead to robots that can monitor and sample the coastal ocean.

(Image credit: Raphael Zufferey)
item.dc:creator: Ari Daniel
